{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Midsummer's Eve
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Midsummer's Eve]] occurs in the 358th year of the [[Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
